name: SMC Global Securities Limited
summary: SMC Global Securities Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides various financial services in India and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Trading and Distribution, Advisory, and Financing. The Trading and Distribution segment engages in the brokerage and propriety trading of shares, commodities, currencies, derivatives, and other securities; provision of clearing, depositary, and insurance broking services; portfolio and wealth management; and distribution of third party financial products. The Advisory segment provides mortgage and loan advisory, real estate broking, and investment banking services. The Financing segment offers loans. The company also offers online trading and real estate advisory services. SMC Global Securities Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in New Delhi, India.
